name: codex-container-lab
description: Disposable Docker Compose labs with isolated Git workspaces for Codex agents.

interface.shortDescription: Run isolated Git workspaces in disposable Compose stacks.
interface.longDescription: Create, inspect, command, synchronize, and destroy disposable Docker Compose development labs owned by an exact Codex thread.
defaultPrompt: Create an isolated lab for this repository.
Run this experiment in a disposable container lab.
Inspect and synchronize my active labs.
